creator: iluxa@ex.ua
text:
Now I also have problems with building it,
I tried several days ago, don't know why,
but it seems that, after recent updates in ports tree,
it doesn't see few dependencies...
But package (windowmaker 0.95.8) that was built some time ago works fine...
"
windowmaker-0.95.8
Name           : windowmaker
Version        : 0.95.8_2
Installed on   : Wed Jun 14 21:31:23 2017 EEST
Origin         : x11-wm/windowmaker
Architecture   : FreeBSD:11:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : windowmaker x11-wm
Licenses       : GPLv2
Maintainer     : hrs@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://windowmaker.org/
Comment        : GNUstep-compliant NeXTstep window manager clone
Options        :
        DOCS           : on
        NLS            : on
Shared Libs required:
        libXpm.so.4
        libwraster.so.5
        libXext.so.6
        libjpeg.so.8
        libfreetype.so.6
        libXft.so.2
        libwebp.so.6
        libpng16.so.16
        libintl.so.8
        libgif.so.7
        libtiff.so.5
        libfontconfig.so.1
        libexif.so.12
        libXinerama.so.1
        libX11.so.6
Shared Libs provided:
        libWINGs.so.3
        libWUtil.so.5
        libWMaker.so.1
